title: Wire LMSR cost into ProbabilityEdit pricing
description: Replace the remaining KL-based ProbabilityEdit quote path in backend/server.py with a shared LMSR quote helper that uses market.liquidity and lmsr_expected_edit_cost for unconditional previews and accepted conditional and unconditional orders, while preserving the existing HTTP, event, idempotency, and account-risk envelopes.

title: Update ProbabilityEdit cost regression coverage
description: Adjust and extend tests in tests/test_bayes_market_api.py so impactScore, pricing.cost, rejection previews, and conditional acceptance paths assert LMSR-backed cost instead of KL divergence, including preview and order consistency on the same marginal transition.
